item.author: cppshane

item.title: 大规模监控 - 通信情报 | Mass surveillance - Communications intelligence
item.description:
你好，

根据我的来源，这是第十三页的“预防”文件，链接在下面提到的来源中；

现在，AI 开发人员可以评估，图像也可以在互联网上扫描，根据最近拍摄的几张照片跟踪街上的人，并根据自主武器做出德国纪录片中提到的决定，那么威胁是什么？

好吧，这种技术不应该落入坏人之手！ 这对他们来说是一件非常好的事情，邪恶的“过于公司化”的政府，如朝鲜等，......但对我们瑞士来说也是如此！ 是的，我们开发了一个像素艺术软件，它可以将自拍转换成图像，就像数据中的光一样，比基本图像轻得多，你可以将它们存储在区块链中，同时，那些 <20Kb 的数据限制了AI 可以用来分析的细节并追踪街上的人！ 完整的 Web 应用程序可在https://pixa.pics以开源形式免费获得。

我们正在为即将到来的 2023 年寻找赞助商，知道我们在来年应该发展什么吗？

资料来源： https ://www.vbs.admin.ch/en/ddps/organisation/administrative-units/intelligence-service.html#dokumente_und_publik

一旦被暂停，vipert 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，vipert 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，vipert 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 vipert 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是您可以用来标记 vipert 的操作：

报告其他不当行为

Unflagging vipert will restore default visibility to their posts. Unflagning vipert 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Hello,

According to my source which is the "prophylax" document at the thirteenth page which is linked in the source mentioned below;

"COMINT is the interception and analysis of communications from companies or individuals transmitted via cable, satellite or radio waves (e.g. telephone calls, e-mails, SMS) in order to obtain useful information about economic or strategic goals. E-mails, chat messages and faxes can be systematically scanned for key words, while telephone calls can be analysed using automatic speech recognition."

Now, AI developers can assess that images can also be scanned within the Internet to stalk individuals in the street based on a few recent photography of them and take decisions as mentioned in a German documentary based on autonomous weapons, to then what is the threat?

Well, that such technology come to belong in the wrong hands that should not! And that is a perfectly nice business to them, the evil "too corporate" governments such as North Korea among others, ... but that is also one for us, in Switzerland! Yay, we developed a pixel art software which can transform selfies into images as light in data, and as much lighter than basic images that you can store them inside blockchain, meanwhile, those <20Kb of data limits the details the AI can use to analyse and track people down the street! The full web application is available for free in open-source at https://pixa.pics.

And we're looking for sponsors for the year 2023 to come, any idea what we should develop during this coming year?

Source: https://www.vbs.admin.ch/en/ddps/organisation/administrative-units/intelligence-service.html#dokumente_und_publik

Once suspended, vipert will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, vipert will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by vipert will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If vipert is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag vipert:

vipert consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging vipert will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: vipert
